ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terpenes" (
  "terpene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terpene */,
  "label_arc_long" TEXT /* Long description of the terpene's aroma */,
  "label_arc_short" TEXT /* Short description of the terpene's aroma */,
  "label_legend" TEXT /* Desired effect or legend associated with the terpene */,
  "height_var" INTEGER /* Height variation of the terpene's concentration */,
  "label_height_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the height variation */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color representation of the terpene */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number for the terpene */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the terpene */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the terpene */,
  "boiling_point" INTEGER /* Boiling point of the terpene */,
  "melting_point" INTEGER /* Melting point of the terpene */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the terpene in water */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the terpene (e.g., plant, synthetic) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the terpene was added to the database */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the terpene's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terpene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "genetic_background" TEXT /* Genetic background or lineage of the strain */,
  "breeder" TEXT /* Name of the breeder or company that developed the strain */,
  "strain_type" TEXT /* Type of the strain (e.g., Indica, Sativa, Hybrid) */,
  "thc_content" REAL /* THC content of the strain in percentage */,
  "cbd_content" REAL /* CBD content of the strain in percentage */,
  "thcv_content" REAL /* THC-V content of the strain in percentage */,
  "cbg_content" REAL /* CBG content of the strain in percentage */,
  "cbn_content" REAL /* CBN content of the strain in percentage */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Growth period of the strain in days */,
  "yield" REAL /* Average yield of the strain in grams per plant */,
  "indoor_outdoor" TEXT /* Whether the strain is grown indoors or outdoors */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strain was added to the database */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the strain's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_terpene_profile" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terpene profile entry */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain */,
  "terpene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terpene */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the terpene in the strain */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the concentration */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the terpene data (e.g., lab test, literature) */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the concentration data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the profile was added to the database */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the profile was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_terpene_profile_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_terpene_profile_terpene_id FOREIGN KEY ("terpene_id") REFERENCES terpenes ("terpene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the effect (e.g., physical, mental) */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the effect (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in hours */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the effect was added to the database */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the effect's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terpene_effect_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "terpene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terpene */,
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the effect */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score indicating the strength of the association */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the association data (e.g., clinical study, user reports) */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the association was added to the database */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terpene_effect_association_terpene_id FOREIGN KEY ("terpene_id") REFERENCES terpenes ("terpene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terpene_effect_association_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("effect_id") REFERENCES effects ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, product developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the note is associated with */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text content of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., general, scientific, breeding) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain variant */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original strain */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Details of any genetic modifications */,
  "breeding_details" TEXT /* Details of the breeding process */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the variant was created */,
  "thcv_content" REAL /* THC-V content of the variant in percentage */,
  "cbg_content" REAL /* CBG content of the variant in percentage */,
  "cbn_content" REAL /* CBN content of the variant in percentage */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Growth period of the variant in days */,
  "yield" REAL /* Average yield of the variant in grams per plant */,
  "indoor_outdoor" TEXT /* Whether the variant is grown indoors or outdoors */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the variant's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_variants_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_terpene_profile" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terpene profile entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain variant */,
  "terpene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terpene */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the terpene in the strain variant */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the concentration */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the terpene data (e.g., lab test, literature) */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the concentration data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the profile was added to the database */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the profile was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_terpene_profile_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES strain_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_terpene_profile_terpene_id FOREIGN KEY ("terpene_id") REFERENCES terpenes ("terpene_id")
)
